name: Cold Noodles
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------SAUCE---------------------------
3 tbsp Sesame paste
6 tbsp Soy sauce
1 tbsp Vinegar
1 piece Ginger root
1 tsp Chili sauce
1 tbsp Sesame oil
2 tbsp Water
1 tbsp Crushed peanuts
1 piece Parsley
Put noodles into boiling water and cook until water boils again. (Oriental Noodles for eating cold might be substituted for fresh noodles) Then add 1/2 cup cold water and cook until noodles are tender. Remove noodles and rinse with cold running water for 1 minute, then drain. Add 1 tablespoon oil into noodle.
Boil bean sprouts, shredded carrots, and shredded celery briefly and then chill. Combine with noodles.
Mix Sauce ingredients thoroughly and pour over the top of the noodles, sprinkle with crushed peanuts and parsley.
